top_signals.title: Kalshi Seeks Approval for Perpetual Futures Tied to Gold, Silver
top_signals.summary: Kalshi Inc. is seeking approval to expand precious-metals trading on its platform with a popular type of derivative that never expires for gold, silver and platinum.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: London’s 24-Hour Trading Is Unlikely to Revive Market, GAM Says
top_signals.summary: The London Stock Exchange’s plan to introduce nearly 24-hour trading for equities may fall short of reviving the bourse’s fortunes, the head of GAM Investments’ global equities team said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
